title: Hanbi Philippine Weaponry
description: This resource pack enables you to have weapons from Philippines. This is a CIT resource pack. You have to rename stuffs in order to have it.
body:
OPTIFINE IS NEEDED!!

This resource pack enables you to experience various weapons in the Philippines.  Renaming a sword or an axe can change its appearance. The creator is a newbie in making this kind of resource pack and still in school so pack updates are not that frequent. 

If you want to donate something, please proceed to discord and come chat with me. Especially, may Filipino brothers out there. I only have GCASH. And lastly, it is not yet verified, so yeah.


RENAMES:

Kalasag = Shield

Arnis = Wooden, stone, and Iron
Balarao = Iron sowrd/axe, diamond sword/axe, and netherite sword/axe
Barong = Iron sowrd/axe, diamond sword/axe, and netherite sword/axe
Ginunting = Iron sowrd/axe, diamond sword/axe, and netherite sword/axe
Gunong = Iron sowrd/axe, diamond sword/axe, and netherite sword/axe
Kalis = Iron sowrd/axe, diamond sword/axe, and netherite sword/axe
Kampilan = Iron sowrd/axe, diamond sword/axe, and netherite sword/axe
Namaka = Iron sowrd/axe, diamond sword/axe, and netherite sword/axe
Panabas = Iron sowrd/axe, diamond sword/axe, and netherite sword/axe
Sundang = Iron sowrd/axe, diamond sword/axe, and netherite sword/axe

Salakot = Carved Pumpkin

If you have suggestion in making philippine war stuff, discord is open for suggestions.
